creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
This is update to sysutils/mcollective port containing:

* version update to latest 2.4.1
* added staging support

The logs from redports build are here: https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140304105600-14780/

Fix: Patch attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Use the patch, test the port and package, commit.
